'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=G8JMplgNxzaJ28lVkrA5tXr22tLyF6SP.EvW15TwmnU-1774745785-1.0.1.1-1t2Ace4sh7nO_gg_gbP.Bc95DzPG_f2K27IVfSMRWPw"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
